notes: Also a Subterras name meaning 'the investor, child of wealth'.
Homograph: WAN is also the regional letter name (wan).
Derives from GALN (dimension) — restore ref when math category lands.
Negation of ZSELT (written ANZELT in source — single S).
Suffix form, e.g. MAGIA = magic energy.
Canon fix: source had LUCT; C replaced with K per author ruling (June 2026).
Literally OH (yin) + MAH (yang) — balance as the union of opposites.
TAUS alone can also mean planet.
Contains regional letter Y. Alternate term: JAZE. Pattern: UZE YUUN = 12 years.
Alternate term: AH. As in GDNSUA, the language name.
Merged: source lists KHEZNI for both heritage and legacy.
ZHA = 144 (gross); a Gaian century is base-12.
Alternate term: YUUN. Pattern: JI JAZE = decade, ZHA JAZE = 144 years.
